thoughts: The script started and is still running (system returned control after 300 seconds with no output).
I need to monitor the debug log every 30 seconds to track progress.

I'll set up a monitoring loop - check up to 10 times, sleeping 30 seconds between checks.

tool_args.code: count=0 && while [ $count -lt 10 ]; do sleep 30; tail -5 /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log; echo "--- Check $((count+1)) completed ---"; count=$((count+1)); done
